title: inula bourgaeana
intro: Inula bourgaeana, also known as Crete Inula or Bourgae's Inula, is a plant species native to the island of Crete in Greece, belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, Inula bourgaeana has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpenes and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Inula bourgaeana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. Inula bourgaeana is typically prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.
